cases.prompt_body: Small institutional decision room framed like a plain conference-table confrontation, two seated managers on one side and one standing engineer opposite, camera anchored to the earlier table-reversal angle, whiteboard behind them stays secondary and softly out of focus with only faint blue-black marker residue from earlier shuttle sketches, one plausible tabletop phone at most, no booklet, calm fluorescent light, authority imbalance immediate
